headline: nCino Appoints Keith Kettell as Chief Revenue Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth
summary: WILMINGTON, N.C., March 31, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- nCino, Inc. (NASDAQ: NCNO), the leading provider of intelligent, best-in-class banking solutions, today announced the appointment of Keith Kettell as Chief Revenue Officer, effective April 1. headline: Compliance First Messaging Partner Tests Salesforce Marketing Cloud Growth Story
summary: Solutions by Text has introduced a native, compliance focused omnichannel messaging integration for Salesforce Marketing Cloud via its FinText platform. The integration allows Salesforce Marketing Cloud users to manage SMS, MMS, and RCS alongside other channels directly within Journey Builder. The launch adds two way, compliant messaging capabilities that are designed for financial services and other regulated sectors. headline: Klient PSA Introduces Hybrid Project Delivery -- Humans Lead, AI Agents Deliver
summary: Klient, the company behind Klient PSA, today announced Hybrid Project Delivery — a new operating model where specialized AI agents are assigned to project tasks as resources inside Salesforce, work alongside human consultants, and deliver outputs that humans review and approve before anything reaches a client or downstream system.

headline: Solutions by Text Embeds FinText Platform into Salesforce Marketing Cloud to Enable Compliant, Mobile Communications with Consumers
summary: Solutions by Text (SBT) today announced the integration of its FinText™ platform and compliant-first messaging capabilities with Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC). This integration allows organizations that run on Salesforce to send compliant SMS, MMS, and RCS messaging directly within Journey Builder, unifying omnichannel campaigns and compliance-focused mobile messaging in a single environment for improved conversion.

raw.headline: Solutions by Text Embeds FinText Platform into Salesforce Marketing Cloud to Enable Compliant, Mobile Communications with Consumers
raw.summary: Solutions by Text (SBT) today announced the integration of its FinText™ platform and compliant-first messaging capabilities with Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC). This integration allows organizations that run on Salesforce to send compliant SMS, MMS, and RCS messaging directly within Journey Builder, unifying omnichannel campaigns and compliance-focused mobile messaging in a single environment for improved conversion.
